sources.summary: Google Cloud growth is led by AI infrastructure demand, Vertex AI adoption, and data/analytics workloads on BigQuery.
Azure remains strong in enterprise migrations, but AI-native startup wins are increasingly contested by Google Cloud.
Developers prefer integrated data + AI tooling where model serving, feature stores, and analytics pipelines are tightly coupled.
Vertex AI and BigQuery are frequently cited for faster iteration in early-stage AI products, while Azure's strength remains enterprise integration and governance.
